dispatches_parallel_for_orthogonal_branc.description: Agent MUST dispatch orthogonal investigation branches in parallel — N orthogonal branches → N parallel dispatches
dispatches_parallel_for_orthogonal_branc.observable_check: execution_log contains N task dispatches AND N branches are orthogonal AND dispatches occur within same turn/batch

dispatches_sequential_for_dependencies.description: Agent MUST chain sequential dispatches only when strict dependency exists — A result needed for B
dispatches_sequential_for_dependencies.observable_check: execution_log contains sequential dispatches (A then B) AND dependency noted in brief AND B depends on A result

dispatches_correct_archetype_per_task.description: Agent MUST dispatch to correct archetype based on task type — RESEARCHER for mechanisms, BUSINESS_ANALYST for needs, QUANTITATIVE_DEVELOPER for numbers
dispatches_correct_archetype_per_task.observable_check: execution_log contains archetype match: RESEARCHER for patterns/mechanisms, BUSINESS_ANALYST for needs/requirements, QUANTITATIVE_DEVELOPER for numerical validation

writes_precise_meta_prompted_briefs.description: Agent MUST write precise, meta-prompted dispatch briefs with all required fields for each worker
writes_precise_meta_prompted_briefs.observable_check: execution_log contains dispatch brief AND brief includes objective, exact question, slice boundary, why it matters, evidence threshold, red flags, output schema, chaining budget, stop condition, execution discipline

tracks_worker_to_decision_mapping.description: Agent MUST track which worker output answers which decision input
tracks_worker_to_decision_mapping.observable_check: execution_log contains worker-to-decision mapping record AND each decision input has assigned worker

attempts_worker_rejection_resolution.description: Agent MUST attempt to resolve worker rejections within boundary before escalating (max 2 attempts)
attempts_worker_rejection_resolution.observable_check: execution_log contains revised brief OR alternative archetype dispatch AND worker rejection occurred

does_not_dispatch_broad_surveys.description: Agent MUST NOT dispatch broad survey tasks — 'survey the landscape of X' is prohibited
does_not_dispatch_broad_surveys.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains 'survey the landscape' OR 'tell me about X' as dispatch brief)

does_not_let_workers_synthesize.description: Agent MUST NOT ask workers to synthesize across other workers — synthesis is lead's job
does_not_let_workers_synthesize.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains brief asking worker to 'synthesize' OR 'combine' other workers' outputs)

does_not_exceed_resolution_attempts.description: Agent MUST NOT loop more than 2 resolution attempts on same worker rejection
does_not_exceed_resolution_attempts.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains resolution_attempt_3 AND rejection was same as rejection_1)
